description.en: Attacks all enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で対象に<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and grants <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> to the whole enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,在<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>内赋予全体敌人<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\nIf the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color>, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to ignore the target's Resilience and Immunity to inflict an irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> and reduce the target's Priority by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 자신에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 부여합니다.\n\n공격 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color> 상태라면 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 효과 저항과 면역을 무시하는 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여하며 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>-50%</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で自分に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n\n攻撃対象が<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>状態の場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象に<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。この効果は対象の効果抵抗と免疫を無視し、解除されない。対象の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>-50%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n若攻击目标处于<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>状态,则有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率获得无法被解除且无视目标效果抵抗和免疫效果的<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,且行动值降低<color=#28d9ed>-50%</color>。

description.en: At the start of battle, greatly reduces all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color>. When hit, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr: 전투 시작 시, 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 크게 감소시키며 피격 시 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 戦闘開始時、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を大幅DOWNする。被弾時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UP。
description.zh: 战斗开始时,大幅降低全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>。受击时,自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> every 4 turns.

<color=#28d9ed>Enraged Ultimate Skill</color>: Grants the caster un-dispellable Attack Up/Damage Reduction for 3 turns, recovers WG 30%, then inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>3</color> turns. Berserk lasts 3 turns.
<color=#28d9ed>Berserk Ultimate</color>: Used when Berserk ends. Attacks all enemies and <color=#28d9ed>Detonates</color> all <color=#28d9ed>Poison</color> effects on them.
description.kr:
4턴 마다 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다.

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입</color> : 자신에게 해제되지 않는 공격력 증가/피해 감소 효과를 3턴 동안 부여하고 WG 30%를 회복한 뒤, 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>을 부여합니다. 광폭화는 3턴 동안 유지됩니다.

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 필살기</color> : 광폭화 종료 시 사용.
적 전체를 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>을 모두 <color=#28d9ed>폭발</color>시킵니다.
description.jp:
4ターンごとに<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:自分に解除不可の攻撃力UP/被ダメージDOWNを3ターン付与し、WG 30%を回復。その後、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与。【狂暴化】は3ターンの間持続する。
<color=#28d9ed>狂暴必殺</color>:狂暴終了時に使用。敵全体に攻撃し、付与された<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>をすべて<color=#28d9ed>爆発</color>させる。
description.zh:
每4回合转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。

<color=#28d9ed>陷入狂暴化和必杀技</color>:为自身赋予不可驱散的攻击力提升/伤害降低,持续3回合;恢复WG 30%,随后对全体敌人施加<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>3</color>回合。狂暴持续3回合。
<color=#28d9ed>狂暴终技</color>:狂暴结束时施放。攻击全体敌人并<color=#28d9ed>引爆</color>其身上的全部<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>效果。
